channel.title: BAC — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on BAC (Bank of America) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: EXITED BAC (-100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) exited BAC in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: TRIMMED BAC (-61%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) trimmed BAC in Q4 2025 · 0.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED BAC (-27%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed BAC in Q4 2025 · 1.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED BAC (+22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added BAC in Q4 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED BAC (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added BAC in Q4 2025 · 28.6% of portfolio. Doubling down further on BAC.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Li Lu)

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED BAC (-7%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed BAC in Q4 2025 · 10.4% of portfolio. Still a top-5 position despite the trim.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: ADDED BAC (+189%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) added BAC in Q3 2025 · 1.3% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: François Rochon: EXITED BAC (-100%) · Q3 2025
item.description: François Rochon (Giverny Capital) exited BAC in Q3 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (François Rochon)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: TRIMMED BAC (-63%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) trimmed BAC in Q3 2025 · 1.5% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED BAC (+49%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added BAC in Q3 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED BAC (-25%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed BAC in Q3 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. The aggressive BAC trim that made headlines.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED BAC (+10%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added BAC in Q3 2025 · 27.4% of portfolio. Doubling down on 15-yr BAC.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Li Lu)

item.title: Bill Nygren: TRIMMED BAC (-8%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) trimmed BAC in Q3 2025 · 2.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: NEW POSITION BAC (+100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller (Duquesne Family Office) new position BAC in Q2 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stanley Druckenmiller)

item.title: Glenn Greenberg: ADDED BAC (+83%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Glenn Greenberg (Brave Warrior Advisors) added BAC in Q2 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Glenn Greenberg)

item.title: Warren Buffett: TRIMMED BAC (-18%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) trimmed BAC in Q2 2025 · 12.4% of portfolio. First wave of the big BAC trim.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Li Lu: ADDED BAC (+8%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) added BAC in Q2 2025 · 25.1% of portfolio. First of three consecutive BAC adds.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Li Lu)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: ADDED BAC (+30%) · Q1 2025
